description: This watch from puma comes in a heavy duty design. The stylish dial and chunky casing gives this watch a tough appearance - perfect for navigating the urban jungle.Case diameter: 40 mmDial shape: RectangleWarranty: 2 YearsPlastic caseBroad rubber straps with a tang claspBlack dial with the jumping cat logo and digital time displayScrew to reset timeSolid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durabilityWater resistant up to 50 metres
